# PyPI account recovery proof for `autocrop`

This file was added and pushed to `github.com/leblancfg/autocrop` to support a
PyPI account recovery request for the `autocrop` project.

- PyPI project: https://pypi.org/project/autocrop/
- Source repository: https://github.com/leblancfg/autocrop
- GitHub owner: leblancfg
- Reason: PyPI account owner can authenticate with username/password but has lost
  access to the two-factor authentication app/device and recovery codes.
- Date: 2026-06-29

No credentials, tokens, OTP seeds, or recovery codes are included in this file.
